race.comment: Tough race. PROFOUNDLY (7) never on the track and kept surging with a gritty third over 1600m in the G3 Kembla Grange Classic. Kept up to the mark with a 1200m tick over trial and gets the gun run. Genuine contender. FEMININO (4) shed her Maiden tag two-back, then turned in a courageous effort from the outside gate to grip on with a nose win over 1600m in the G3 Kembla Grange Classic. Drawn out again and not sure where her ceiling is. Keep safe. CLASSIC GEM (6) Group placed Maiden filly who strips fitter with her eye-catching return when second in the G3 Alexandra Stakes over 1600m at Caulfield. Trip suits and not to be underestimated. SPICY LU (1) huge run second-up when sat on the solid tempo before tiring late for a respectable eighth over 1600m at Kembla Grange. Can slide across from the wide gate and figure prominently. SOVERATO (3) big jump in class when fourth in the G2 Phar Lap over 1500m at Rosehill. Ready for the trip fourth-up with J Mac aboard.
